chapter_title.en: Reward of bearing witness to the Oneness of Almighty God and prophethood of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.)

text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ هِلَالٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی الْأَرْمَنِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عِمْرَانَ الْخَرَّاطِ عَنْ بِشْرٍ الْأَوْزَاعِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ شَهِدَ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ لَمْ یَشْهَدْ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص کُتِبَ لَهُ عَشْرُ حَسَنَاتٍ فَإِنْ شَهِدَ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً رَسُولُ اللَّهِ کُتِبَ لَهُ ألفی [أَلْفَا] أَلْفِ حَسَنَهٍ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Hilal from Muhammad b. Isa al-Armani from Abi ’Imran al-Kharrat from Bishr al-Awzaa’i from Ja’far b. Muhammad from his father (a.s.) who said: “One who bears witness saying, Laa ilaaha illallaah and does not say Muhammadur rasoolullaah gets ten rewards. However, if he says Laa ilaaha illallaah as well as Muhammadur rasoolullaah he would get a million rewards.”
